content_en:
ground and dried. Then, when warranted, the medication is administered through the nose of the afflicted person while he lay on his back and while his shoulders are elevated so that the head lay back. In this position, the medication would reach the head and extract the disease by sneezing.

The Prophet s, has praised using this method when there is a need that warrants it. Further, Abu Dawood mentioned in his Sunon that the Prophet sg used this method himself.

The Prophet's guidance on treating diseases of heart

Abu Dawood narrated that Sa'd said, "Once, | became ill and the Messenger of Allah b came to visit me and placed his hand on the center of my chest, until I felt its coldness on my heart. He then said:

Dates in general and dried dates in particular, especially from Medina, posses tremendous qualities and are especially effective in treating heart aliments. Using seven dates is another quality that can only be known

—— The Prophetic Medicine

In the Sahihan it is narrated that Sa'd bin Abu Waqaas said, "The Messenger of Allah b said:

"Whoever eats seven dates from the area of AIAliab when he gets up in the morning then no poison or magic would harm him that day."

In another narration, the Prophet b said:

"Whoever eats seven dotes produced between the two areas in Al-Medina that are covered with burned black stones in the morning, will not be harmed by poison until he reaches the night."

Dates are warm in the second degree and dry in the first degree. Dates constitute a good type of nutrition, especially for those whose regular diet contains dates, such as the people of Al-Medina. Dates are the best type of food for the residents of the hot and mildly warm countries, more so than for the residents of cold areas who have an elevated inner temperature, whereas those in warm areas have a colder inner temperature. This is why the people in Hijaz, Yemen and Tai'f, and similar areas, eat hot foods such as dates and honey. They In addition use pepper and ginger in their food more than other areas; sometimes ten fold as much. Some of them even eat Zanjabil (ginger) just as other people eat sweets. They

even transport these types of foods with them when traveling. As we have stated, these types of food are suitable for the residents of warm areas and do not harm them because of the lower inner temperature of their bodies. On a similar note, we should mention that wellwater becomes colder during summer and warmer during winter. Further, the stomach digests because thick (or complex) foods in winter more than during summer.

For the people of Medina, dried dates are their staple like wheat is to other people. In addition, dried dates from the area of AI-Aliyah in Medina are one of the best kinds of dates because they are firm, delicious and sweet.

Dates are a type of fruit that is In addition used for its nutritional and medicinal value, being favorable for most bodies and for their role in strengthening the natural heat. In addition, dates do not produce harmful wastes or excrements such as the other types of foods and fruits. Rather, dates preserve the bodily wastes from being spoiled and from rotting, especially for those used to eating dried dates.

The Hadit!, we mentioned about dried dates [in the beginning of the chapter] is specifically for the people of Al-Medina and surrounding areas. It is a fact that the medicinal value of the herbs and plants that grow in certain areas is closely related to the quality of the air and

—— The Prophetic Medicine

the type of soil in those areas. A certain medicinal herb might be useful in its natural habitat but not if it is grown elsewhere. The various lands differ in their nature and characteristics, just as people differ from each other. Sometimes, a certain type of plant might be a regular staple in the diet in a certain area, while it is poisonous in other areas. Sometimes, certain remedies that people use in a certain land might be a regular staple for other people in another area. Some types of medicine might provide a cure for some illnesses for some people while curing other kinds of diseases for other people. Furthermore, there might be a beneficial cure in some area that does not work in other areas.

Using seven dates has a spiritual and material significance. Allah has created seven heavens, seven earths, seven day’. in the week and made the creation of mankind pass through seven stages. In addition, Allah made the Tawaf seven circumambulations, and the Sa'i In addition seven trips between Safa and Marwah. In addition, the Jamrat are stoned with seven pebbles each and the Takbir during the 'Gd prayer is made seven times. In addition, the Prophet sag said about young children,

"Command him to pray upon reaching the age of seven."

In addition, when the child reaches the age of seven, he is given the choice between his father and

mother, according to some opinions. When the Prophet m, was ill he ordered that water be poured on him from seven different water skins. Allah has In addition sent the destructive wind on the people of Ad for seven consecutive nights. The Prophet of Allah In addition asked Allah in supplication to test his people with a similar seven years of famine that the people of the Prophet Yusuf (Joseph) were tested with. Furthermore, when Allah gave the example of charity, He compared it to a grain (of corn); it grows seven ears, and each ear has a hundred grains. In addition, the ears of corn that the king saw during the time of Prophet Yusuf (Joseph) were seven and the number of the years during which the king's people would farm the land was In addition seven. In addition, charity is multiplied seven hundred times, to much more. Further, there are seventy thousand members of the Muslim Nation who will enter Paradise without questioning. The number seven has a special significance more than other numbers and only Allah has full knowledge of the wisdom behind choosing this number above other numbers.

The Hadith mentioned that eating seven dates from a certain area in Al-Medina prevents poisoning and magic, indicating the special qualities of this type of date. Had it been Hippocrates or Galinus who issued this statement rather than the Prophet m,, the doctors would quickly accept the statement without question, even

—— The Prophetic Medicine

though they would be issuing it based on guessing and not on fact. The statements that come from the Prophet *, whose words are certainly true and divinely revealed, deserve to be believed in more and submitted to, without any hesitation or denial.

The dried dates mentioned in Hadith, being useful against certain poisons and only in some areas Further, we should state here that it is a condition that the sick person should believe that the medicine will help him, so that his body accepts it and benefits from it. It is a fact that sometimes merely believing that the medicine will work helps cure some ailments, as many people have witnessed in this regard. When the heart accepts that a certain medicine carries the cure, the body will feel an elevation in its strength and in the instinctive heat that will help the body get rid of and extract harmful substances. On the other hand, sometimes an effective medicine fails to work because the patient does not believe that it will cure him, and consequently, his body neither accepts it, nor benefits from it.

Even the Qura’an, which is the best, most beneficial remedy ever, both in this life and in the Hereafter, and which is a cure for every disease, will not benefit the heart that does not believe in its value as a cure and a remedy. Rather, the Qura'an only adds more disease to such evil hearts.

There is not a more effective cure for the diseases of the heart than the Qura'an, for it completely eradicates the ills of the heart, preserves the heart's health and wellbeing and defends it against all that might bring harm to it. Yet, most of the hearts ignore the Qura'an and do not believe in it, and thus refrain from using it. Instead, such people refer to other types of medicine that were prepared by their like from among mankind, thus preventing their hearts from benefiting from the Qura'an. Consequently, the symptoms that attacked their hearts will persist and will expose their hearts to even more ailments. By the passage of time, both the doctors and the patients will get used to the medicines produced and prescribed by their like, leaders, or those whom they respect. In this case, disasters will accumulate and the diseases will become harder to cure. And the more they (those who ignore the Qura'an) use these medicines, the more strength they will add to the ailment!

The Prophet's guidance on neutralizing the harm of

various foods and fruits

In the Sahihan it is narrated that 'Abudllah bin Ja'far 'a. AI %3 said, "I saw the Messenger of Allah s&. eat ripe dates with cucumbers."

Ripe dates are hot in the second degree, increase sexual desire and add strength to the cold stomach. But, ripe dates rot quickly, bring thirst, harm the teeth, spoil

—— The Prophetic Medicine

the blood and cause headaches, various clogs and pain in the prostate. Cucumbers are cold and wet in the second degree and they prevent thirst, have a refreshing aroma and cool the stomach. When the seeds of the cucumbers are dried then crushed and are boiled with water, they produce a drink that will quench the thirst, help produce urine and soothe the pain in the prostate. When cucumber seeds are crushed and then sifted, it will whiten the teeth when brushed with it. Further, when cucumber plant leaves are crushed and blended with raisin jelly and used as a bandage, they will help against the bite of the hydrophobic dog.

In general, dates are hot while cucumbers are cool, and each is suitable for the other and In addition neutralizes each others harm. This is a type of balancing off the harm of one substance by combining it with its opposite or antidote, and these are the goals that preventive science seeks to achieve. In fact, these are the goals that the science of medicine as a whole seeks to achieve.
content_id:
tanah dan dikeringkan. Kemudian, jika diperlukan, obat tersebut diberikan melalui hidung orang yang sakit saat ia berbaring telentang dengan bahu ditinggikan sehingga kepala menengadah ke belakang. Dalam posisi ini, obat akan mencapai kepala dan mengeluarkan penyakit melalui bersin.

Nabi ﷺ memuji penggunaan metode ini ketika ada kebutuhan yang memerlukannya. Lebih lanjut, Abu Dawood menyebutkan dalam Sunan-nya bahwa Nabi ﷺ sendiri pernah menggunakan metode ini.

Petunjuk Nabi dalam mengobati penyakit hati

Abu Dawood meriwayatkan bahwa Sa'd berkata, "Suatu ketika aku jatuh sakit, lalu Rasulullah ﷺ datang menjengukku dan meletakkan tangannya di tengah dadaku hingga aku merasakan dinginnya di hatiku. Kemudian beliau bersabda:

Kurma secara umum dan kurma kering secara khusus, terutama dari Madinah, memiliki khasiat yang luar biasa dan sangat efektif dalam mengobati penyakit hati. Penggunaan tujuh butir kurma merupakan khasiat lain yang hanya dapat diketahui

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

Dalam Sahihain diriwayatkan bahwa Sa'd bin Abu Waqqash berkata, "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda:

"Barangsiapa memakan tujuh butir kurma dari daerah Al-'Aliyah di pagi hari, maka racun maupun sihir tidak akan membahayakannya pada hari itu."

Dalam riwayat lain, Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

"Barangsiapa memakan tujuh butir kurma yang dihasilkan dari dua daerah berbatu hitam di Madinah pada pagi hari, maka ia tidak akan terkena bahaya racun hingga malam hari."

Kurma bersifat panas pada tingkat kedua dan kering pada tingkat pertama. Kurma merupakan jenis nutrisi yang baik, terutama bagi mereka yang makanan pokoknya mengandung kurma, seperti penduduk Madinah. Kurma adalah jenis makanan terbaik bagi penduduk negeri panas dan beriklim hangat, lebih dari penduduk daerah dingin yang memiliki suhu tubuh bagian dalam yang lebih tinggi, sementara penduduk daerah hangat memiliki suhu tubuh bagian dalam yang lebih dingin. Inilah mengapa penduduk Hijaz, Yaman, dan Tha'if, serta daerah serupa, memakan makanan yang bersifat panas seperti kurma dan madu. Mereka juga menggunakan lada dan jahe dalam makanan mereka lebih banyak dibandingkan daerah lain; terkadang hingga sepuluh kali lipat. Sebagian dari mereka bahkan memakan jahe sebagaimana orang lain memakan manisan. Mereka

bahkan membawa jenis makanan ini saat bepergian. Sebagaimana telah kami sebutkan, jenis makanan ini cocok untuk penduduk daerah hangat dan tidak membahayakan mereka karena suhu tubuh bagian dalam mereka yang lebih rendah. Dalam catatan serupa, perlu kami sebutkan bahwa air sumur menjadi lebih dingin di musim panas dan lebih hangat di musim dingin. Selain itu, lambung mencerna makanan berat (atau kompleks) di musim dingin lebih baik daripada di musim panas.

Bagi penduduk Madinah, kurma kering adalah makanan pokok mereka sebagaimana gandum bagi penduduk daerah lain. Selain itu, kurma kering dari daerah Al-'Aliyah di Madinah adalah salah satu jenis kurma terbaik karena padat, lezat, dan manis.

Kurma adalah jenis buah yang juga digunakan untuk nilai gizi dan obatnya, baik bagi kebanyakan tubuh dan untuk memperkuat panas alami tubuh. Selain itu, kurma tidak menghasilkan limbah atau kotoran berbahaya seperti jenis makanan dan buah lainnya. Sebaliknya, kurma menjaga limbah tubuh agar tidak rusak dan membusuk, terutama bagi mereka yang terbiasa memakan kurma kering.

Hadits yang kami sebutkan tentang kurma kering [di awal bab] secara khusus ditujukan untuk penduduk Madinah dan sekitarnya. Merupakan fakta bahwa khasiat obat dari tumbuhan dan tanaman yang tumbuh di daerah tertentu sangat berkaitan dengan kualitas udara dan

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

jenis tanah di daerah tersebut. Tanaman obat tertentu mungkin bermanfaat di habitat aslinya tetapi tidak jika ditanam di tempat lain. Berbagai tanah berbeda dalam sifat dan karakteristiknya, sebagaimana manusia berbeda satu sama lain. Terkadang, jenis tanaman tertentu menjadi makanan pokok biasa di suatu daerah, sementara beracun di daerah lain. Terkadang, obat-obatan tertentu yang digunakan orang di suatu daerah menjadi makanan pokok bagi orang lain di daerah yang berbeda. Beberapa jenis obat mungkin memberikan penyembuhan untuk beberapa penyakit bagi sebagian orang, sementara menyembuhkan jenis penyakit lain bagi orang lain. Lebih lanjut, mungkin ada obat yang bermanfaat di suatu daerah tetapi tidak bekerja di daerah lain.

Penggunaan tujuh butir kurma memiliki makna spiritual dan material. Allah telah menciptakan tujuh langit, tujuh bumi, tujuh hari dalam sepekan, dan menjadikan penciptaan manusia melalui tujuh tahap. Selain itu, Allah menjadikan tawaf tujuh putaran, dan sa'i juga tujuh perjalanan antara Shafa dan Marwah. Selain itu, jumrah dilempari dengan tujuh kerikil masing-masing, dan takbir dalam salah 'Id dilakukan tujuh kali. Selain itu, Nabi ﷺ bersabda tentang anak-anak kecil,

"Perintahkanlah ia untuk salah ketika mencapai usia tujuh tahun."

Selain itu, ketika anak mencapai usia tujuh tahun, ia diberi pilihan antara ayah dan

ibunya, menurut sebagian pendapat. Ketika Nabi ﷺ sakit, beliau memerintahkan agar air dituangkan kepadanya dari tujuh tempat air yang berbeda. Allah juga mengirimkan angin penghancur kepada kaum 'Ad selama tujuh malam berturut-turut. Nabi Allah juga memohon kepada Allah dalam du'a-nya agar menguji kaumnya dengan tujuh tahun kelaparan yang serupa dengan yang dialami kaum Nabi Yusuf. Lebih lanjut, ketika Allah memberikan perumpamaan tentang sedekah, Dia menyamakannya dengan sebutir biji; ia menumbuhkan tujuh tangkai, dan setiap tangkai berisi seratus biji. Selain itu, tangkai-tangkai gandum yang dilihat raja pada masa Nabi Yusuf berjumlah tujuh, dan jumlah tahun di mana kaum raja akan bercocok tanam juga tujuh. Selain itu, sedekah dilipatgandakan tujuh ratus kali, bahkan lebih. Lebih lanjut, ada tujuh puluh ribu anggota umat Islam yang akan masuk surga tanpa dihisab. Angka tujuh memiliki makna khusus lebih dari angka-angka lainnya, dan hanya Allah yang mengetahui sepenuhnya hikmah di balik pemilihan angka ini di atas angka-angka lain.

Hadits tersebut menyebutkan bahwa memakan tujuh butir kurma dari daerah tertentu di Madinah mencegah keracunan dan sihir, yang menunjukkan khasiat istimewa dari jenis kurma ini. Seandainya Hippocrates atau Galenus yang mengeluarkan pernyataan ini dan bukan Nabi ﷺ, para dokter akan segera menerima pernyataan tersebut tanpa pertanyaan, meskipun

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

mereka mengeluarkannya berdasarkan dugaan dan bukan berdasarkan fakta. Pernyataan yang datang dari Nabi ﷺ, yang ucapannya pasti benar dan merupakan wahyu ilahi, lebih layak untuk diimani dan ditaati tanpa keraguan atau penolakan apa pun.

Kurma kering yang disebutkan dalam hadits, bermanfaat melawan racun tertentu dan hanya di beberapa daerah. Lebih lanjut, kami harus menyebutkan di sini bahwa merupakan syarat bahwa orang sakit harus meyakini bahwa obat tersebut akan membantunya, sehingga tubuhnya menerima dan mendapat manfaat darinya. Merupakan fakta bahwa terkadang sekadar meyakini bahwa obat akan berhasil membantu menyembuhkan beberapa penyakit, sebagaimana banyak orang telah menyaksikannya. Ketika hati menerima bahwa obat tertentu membawa kesembuhan, tubuh akan merasakan peningkatan kekuatan dan panas naluriah yang akan membantu tubuh menyingkirkan dan mengeluarkan zat-zat berbahaya. Sebaliknya, terkadang obat yang efektif gagal bekerja karena pasien tidak meyakini bahwa obat itu akan menyembuhkannya, dan akibatnya tubuhnya tidak menerima maupun mendapat manfaat darinya.

Bahkan Al-Qur'an, yang merupakan obat terbaik dan paling bermanfaat sepanjang masa, baik di kehidupan dunia maupun akhirat, dan yang merupakan penyembuh bagi setiap penyakit, tidak akan bermanfaat bagi hati yang tidak meyakini nilainya sebagai penyembuh dan obat. Sebaliknya, Al-Qur'an hanya menambah penyakit bagi hati-hati yang jahat tersebut.

Tidak ada penyembuh yang lebih efektif untuk penyakit hati selain Al-Qur'an, karena ia sepenuhnya memberantas penyakit-penyakit hati, menjaga kesehatan dan kesejahteraan hati, serta melindunginya dari segala yang mungkin membawa bahaya. Namun, kebanyakan hati mengabaikan Al-Qur'an dan tidak meyakininya, sehingga enggan menggunakannya. Sebaliknya, orang-orang seperti itu merujuk pada jenis obat lain yang disiapkan oleh sesama manusia, sehingga menghalangi hati mereka dari manfaat Al-Qur'an. Akibatnya, gejala-gejala yang menyerang hati mereka akan terus berlanjut dan akan membuat hati mereka terpapar penyakit yang lebih banyak lagi. Seiring berjalannya waktu, baik para dokter maupun pasien akan terbiasa dengan obat-obatan yang diproduksi dan diresepkan oleh sesama mereka, para pemimpin mereka, atau orang-orang yang mereka hormati. Dalam kasus ini, bencana akan menumpuk dan penyakit akan semakin sulit disembuhkan. Dan semakin banyak mereka (yang mengabaikan Al-Qur'an) menggunakan obat-obatan ini, semakin banyak kekuatan yang akan mereka tambahkan pada penyakit tersebut!

Petunjuk Nabi dalam menetralisir bahaya dari

berbagai makanan dan buah-buahan

Dalam Sahihan diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Ja'far berkata, "Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memakan kurma matang bersama mentimun."

Kurma matang bersifat panas pada derajat kedua, meningkatkan hasrat seksual dan menambah kekuatan pada perut yang dingin. Namun, kurma matang cepat membusuk, menimbulkan rasa haus, merusak gigi, mengotori

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

darah dan menyebabkan sakit kepala, berbagai sumbatan dan nyeri pada prostat. Mentimun bersifat dingin dan lembap pada derajat kedua dan mencegah rasa haus, memiliki aroma yang menyegarkan dan mendinginkan perut. Ketika biji mentimun dikeringkan kemudian ditumbuk dan direbus dengan air, akan menghasilkan minuman yang menghilangkan dahaga, membantu melancarkan buang air kecil dan meredakan nyeri pada prostat. Ketika biji mentimun ditumbuk kemudian diayak, ia akan memutihkan gigi jika digunakan untuk menyikat gigi. Selanjutnya, ketika daun tanaman mentimun ditumbuk dan dicampur dengan sari kismis lalu digunakan sebagai perban, ia akan membantu mengatasi gigitan anjing gila.

Secara umum, kurma bersifat panas sedangkan mentimun bersifat dingin, dan masing-masing cocok satu sama lain serta menetralisir bahaya yang ditimbulkan oleh yang lainnya. Ini adalah jenis penyeimbangan bahaya dari suatu zat dengan menggabungkannya dengan lawannya atau penawarnya, dan inilah tujuan yang ingin dicapai oleh ilmu pencegahan. Bahkan, inilah tujuan yang ingin dicapai oleh ilmu kedokteran secara keseluruhan.

ground and dried. Then, when warranted, the medication is administered through the nose of the afflicted person while he lay on his back and while his shoulders are elevated so that the head lay back. In this position, the medication would reach the head and extract the disease by sneezing.

mother, according to some opinions. On the other hand, sometimes an effective medicine fails to work because the patient does not believe that it will cure him, and consequently, his body neither accepts it, nor benefits from it.

Even the Qura’an, which is the best, most beneficial remedy ever, both in this life and in the Hereafter, and which is a cure for every disease, will not benefit the heart that does not believe in its value as a cure and a remedy. Rather, the Qura'an only adds more disease to such evil hearts.

There is not a more effective cure for the diseases of the heart than the Qura'an, for it completely eradicates the ills of the heart, preserves the heart's health and wellbeing and defends it against all that might bring harm to it. Yet, most of the hearts ignore the Qura'an and do not believe in it, and thus refrain from using it. Instead, such people refer to other types of medicine that were prepared by their like from among mankind, thus preventing their hearts from benefiting from the Qura'an. Consequently, the symptoms that attacked their hearts will persist and will expose their hearts to even more ailments. By the passage of time, both the doctors and the patients will get used to the medicines produced and prescribed by their like, leaders, or those whom they respect. In this case, disasters will accumulate and the diseases will become harder to cure. And the more they (those who ignore the Qura'an) use these medicines, the more strength they will add to the ailment!

النبي ﷺ's guidance on neutralizing the harm of

various foods and fruits

In the Sahihan it is narrated that 'Abudllah bin Ja'far 'a. AI %3 said, "I saw رسول الله ﷺ s&. eat ripe dates with cucumbers."

Ripe dates are hot in the second degree, increase sexual desire and add strength to the cold stomach. But, ripe dates rot quickly, bring thirst, harm the teeth, spoil

—— The Prophetic Medicine

the blood and cause headaches, various clogs and pain in the prostate. Cucumbers are cold and wet in the second degree and they prevent thirst, have a refreshing aroma and cool the stomach. When the seeds of the cucumbers are dried then crushed and are boiled with water, they produce a drink that will quench the thirst, help produce urine and soothe the pain in the prostate. When cucumber seeds are crushed and then sifted, it will whiten the teeth when brushed with it. Further, when cucumber plant leaves are crushed and blended with raisin jelly and used as a bandage, they will help against the bite of the hydrophobic dog.

In general, dates are hot while cucumbers are cool, and each is suitable for the other and In addition neutralizes each others harm. This is a type of balancing off the harm of one substance by combining it with its opposite or antidote, and these are the goals that preventive science seeks to achieve. In fact, these are the goals that the science of medicine as a whole seeks to achieve.
